description: Create and audit Printify products with manifest-driven image uploads, personalization checks, and local proofing.

novel_features.name: Personalization Coverage Audit
novel_features.description: Audit a product for documented personalization placeholder fields, missing text/image setup, and unsupported browser-only gaps.

novel_features.name: Placement Matrix
novel_features.description: Show variant, print-area, placeholder, uploaded image, x/y/scale/angle, and missing-placement rows for a product.

novel_features.name: Catalog Margin Matrix
novel_features.description: Join catalog variants and shipping data to estimate per-variant cost and margin at a target retail price.

novel_features.name: Product Manifest Drift
novel_features.description: Compare an intended product manifest against the current Printify product payload after create or update.

novel_features.name: Personalized Batch Manifest Compiler
novel_features.description: Expand a reusable product manifest and CSV rows into per-product manifests using documented image and text placeholder fields.

novel_features.name: Asset Reuse Map
novel_features.description: List uploaded images, where each is used, unused uploads, and products sharing the same artwork.

novel_features.name: Fulfillment Risk Scan
novel_features.description: Flag open orders tied to risky product, variant, publish, or shipment states.
